rulings.Case Title: JOHNNY MARENCO VS. RAFAEL CAMPOS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Judgment For Foreclosure Pursuant To Terms Of Stipulation For Entry Judgment And For Appointment Of A Receiver
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday February 6, 2018, line 1. CROSS COMPLAINANT RAFAEL CAMPOS Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Judgment For Foreclosure Pursuant To Terms Of Stipulation For Entry Judgment And For Appointment Of A Receiver GRANTED. No opposition filed. A judgment on the cross-complaint shall be entered. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JASON TRAVIS VS. HARRIETT M WILSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday February 6, 2018, line 2. DEFENDANT HARRIETT WILSON, THE HARRIETT M. WILSON TRUST Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B and Court's January 9, 2018 Minute Order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JASON TRAVIS VS. HARRIETT M WILSON
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday February 6, 2018, line 2. DEFENDANT HARRIETT WILSON, THE HARRIETT M. WILSON TRUST DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B and Court's January 9, 2018 Minute Order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PING YUEN L.P. VS. CLEVELAND REID JR ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday February 6, 2018, line 6. DEFENDANT CLEVELAND REID MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT Hearing Required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC. VS. ERICA SNYDER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday February 6, 2018, line 3. DEFENDANT ERICA SNYDER DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SOJOURN PROPERTIES, INC. VS. TIMOTHY CAMERON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday February 6, 2018, line 4. DEFENDANT TIMOTHY CAMERON MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT Hearing Required. Defendant to (1) provide medical evidence of his inability to address the matter from December 13, 2017 to January 26, 2018; (2) present Proof of Personal service of this motion; (3) be prepared to post $6,960. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MISSION BAY NORTH FINANCING, L.P. VS. IRMA ENCINAS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice; Motion; Points And Authorities To Strike Certain Portions Of Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday February 6, 2018, line . DEFENDANT IRMA ENCINAS Notice; Motion; Points And Authorities To Strike Certain Portions Of Complaint GRANTED without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Defendant to present a file endorsed copy of the proof of service for this motion at the hearing. Defendant to prepare order and present it at the hearing for execution. Defendant to file answer no later than February 13, 2018. = (501/REQ)
